messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0038",
  "title": "媒体声音",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Section text:
媒体声音

message.content: This section contains only the heading "媒体声音" (Media Voices) and lacks any body text, data, or references. Consequently, it cannot answer specific retrieval questions regarding entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, tables, figures, or evidence types. It solely indicates a high-level topic related to media coverage, press statements, or public commentary, serving as a structural placeholder for potential media-related content elsewhere in the document.
